title: AXLocaleService
description: Service class for managing locale-specific formatting, date/time, and number formatting.

types.title: AXLocaleService

props.name: defaultLocale
props.description: Default locale identifier to use when current locale is not available.

props.name: localeProfile
props.description: Current locale profile containing formatting options and settings.

types.description: Service for managing locale-specific formatting including dates, times, numbers, and currencies with support for multiple locales.

methods.name: setLocale
methods.description: Sets the current locale and loads corresponding locale profile.

methods.name: formatDate
methods.description: Formats a date according to the current locale settings.

methods.name: formatTime
methods.description: Formats a time according to the current locale settings.

methods.name: formatDateTime
methods.description: Formats a date and time according to the current locale settings.

methods.name: formatNumber
methods.description: Formats a number according to the current locale settings.

methods.name: formatCurrency
methods.description: Formats a currency value according to the current locale settings.

methods.name: parseDate
methods.description: Parses a date string according to the current locale settings.

methods.name: parseNumber
methods.description: Parses a number string according to the current locale settings.

methods.name: getDateFormat
methods.description: Returns the date format for the current locale.

methods.name: getTimeFormat
methods.description: Returns the time format for the current locale.

methods.name: getNumberFormat
methods.description: Returns the number format for the current locale.

methods.name: onLocaleChange
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when the locale changes.

methods.name: onFormatChange
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when formatting options change.

methods.name: onProfileLoad
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when locale profile is loaded.

methods.name: onLocaleError
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when locale operations fail.
